ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_name" TEXT /* Name of the image */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG, BMP) */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "compression_type" TEXT /* Type of compression used (e.g., lossless, lossy) */,
  "dpi" REAL /* Dots per inch (DPI) of the image */,
  "copyright_info" TEXT /* Copyright information for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pixels" (
  "pixel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pixel */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the pixel belongs to */,
  "x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the pixel */,
  "y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the pixel */,
  "w0" REAL /* Weight of the pixel */,
  "c_gray" INTEGER /* Grayscale value of the pixel */,
  "red" INTEGER /* Red component of the pixel */,
  "green" INTEGER /* Green component of the pixel */,
  "blue" INTEGER /* Blue component of the pixel */,
  "alpha" INTEGER /* Alpha (transparency) value of the pixel */,
  "pixel_class" TEXT /* Classification of the pixel (e.g., background, object) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pixel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pixels_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_palettes" (
  "palette_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color palette */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the color palette */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the color palette */,
  "palette_type" TEXT /* Type of color palette (e.g., monochrome, polychrome) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("palette_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "palette_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color palette the color belongs to */,
  "red" INTEGER /* Red component of the color */,
  "green" INTEGER /* Green component of the color */,
  "blue" INTEGER /* Blue component of the color */,
  "alpha" INTEGER /* Alpha (transparency) value of the color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colors_palette_id FOREIGN KEY ("palette_id") REFERENCES color_palettes ("palette_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the feature was extracted from */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., brightness, contrast) */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., visual, metadata) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_features_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the object was detected in */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "object_class" TEXT /* Class of the object (e.g., car, person) */,
  "object_confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the object detection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_objects_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the platform */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the permission */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the permission applies to */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "permission_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the permission expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the analytics data applies to */,
  "analytics_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytics metric (e.g., views, engagement) */,
  "analytics_value" REAL /* Value of the analytics metric */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date when the analytics data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the model was trained on */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_learning_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model that made the prediction */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the prediction was made on */,
  "prediction_value" REAL /* Value of the prediction */,
  "prediction_confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_segmentations" (
  "segmentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segmentation */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the segmentation was applied to */,
  "segmentation_name" TEXT /* Name of the segmentation */,
  "segmentation_mask" TEXT /* Mask data for the segmentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segmentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_segmentations_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)
